name: release-management
description: Defines and tracks the release process: versioning, changelogs, and deployment checklists.

issues.title: Document or establish release process
issues.description: Review the current release workflow. If one exists, document it in docs/RELEASE-PROCESS.md. If not, establish a semver + changelog workflow with tagging conventions.

routines.name: Release readiness check
routines.description: Check for unreleased changes and cut a release if warranted.
